'''favushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyberaggression|cyberaggression]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyberaggression|cyberaggression]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| favushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fævishith|fævishith]] || [[word:fævishij|fævishij]] || [[word:fævishish|fævishish]] || [[word:fævishi|fævishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:favuvushuth|favuvushuth]] || [[word:favuvushuj|favuvushuj]] || [[word:favuvushush|favuvushush]] || [[word:favuvushu|favuvushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:favushuth|favushuth]] || [[word:favushuj|favushuj]] || [[word:favushush|favushush]] || [[word:favushu|favushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:favufshuth|favufshuth]] || [[word:favufshuj|favufshuj]] || [[word:favufshush|favufshush]] || [[word:favufshuf|favufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:favushuthu|favushuthu]] || [[word:favushuju|favushuju]] || [[word:favushushu|favushushu]] || [[word:favushuku|favushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:favushuth|favushuth]] || [[word:favushuj|favushuj]] || [[word:favushush|favushush]] || [[word:favushu|favushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:favushuthul|favushuthul]] || [[word:favushujul|favushujul]] || [[word:favushushul|favushushul]] || [[word:favushukul|favushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:favushuthuthu|favushuthuthu]] || [[word:favushujuju|favushujuju]] || [[word:favushushushu|favushushushu]] || [[word:favushuku|favushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:favushuthun|favushuthun]] || [[word:favushujun|favushujun]] || [[word:favushushun|favushushun]] || [[word:favushukun|favushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:favushuthuoro|favushuthuoro]] || [[word:favushujuoro|favushujuoro]] || [[word:favushushuoro|favushushuoro]] || [[word:favushukuoro|favushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
